payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Overhead ceiling-mounted fan with multiple dark-stained wooden blades and a central frosted glass light shade (shows slight yellowish discoloration); metal mounting hardware visible; view from below and partly edge-cropped in the image; approximately 2.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"fan","short_description":"wood-blade ceiling fan with light","long_description":"Overhead ceiling-mounted fan with multiple dark-stained wooden blades and a central frosted glass light shade (shows slight yellowish discoloration); metal mounting hardware visible; view from below and partly edge-cropped in the image; approximately 2.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark-stained wooden blades","frosted glass light shade","yellowish discoloration on glass","metal mounting hardware","viewed from below","partially edge-cropped","4–5 blades visible"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
